author: claude
content: delete_tmpdir #1104 (vringar's local branch, head c0fe18e5 — NOT the ndanner-wesleyancs fork #1093/d87db54b, left untouched): clean (no conflicts); rebased -b 1 commit onto master 315e6672. Touches browser_manager.py / config.py / deploy_firefox.py: adds a per-spawn geckodriver TMPDIR (browser_params.tmpdir) and deletes it on browser close to clean up geckodriver's leftover XPI copy. VERIFY: all 3 files py_compile clean; imports intact (os/shutil/tempfile/Path/Optional all present post-rebase); jj-precommit GREEN incl mypy (new Optional[Path] field + Service(env=...) arg typecheck clean); pytest --collect-only clean (142 tests). new tip 9b704960; MERGEABLE. AMBIGUITY (b) — NO OVERLAP with merged tmpdir work on master: master's only tmpdir code is profile-archiving (tempfile.mkdtemp 'openwpm_profile_archive_' + shutil.rmtree of profile paths in browser_manager.py); master has NO browser_params.tmpdir field, NO TMPDIR env passed to geckodriver, nothing in deploy_firefox.py. This branch's geckodriver-XPI-cleanup is orthogonal and rebased cleanly. Not superseded.
